examples: It is another unfortunate myth of our culture that older people are asexual.
Dredd has been an asexual character since his introduction in the second issue of 2000 AD (1977).
But it is only by looking at an asexual group that the second can be tested independently of the first.
That term could also include the 1% of people who identify as asexual, which means they aren't sexually attracted to anyone.
